title: Watch Me Run
description: Allows you to look around freely or move while your inventory screen is open and removes the transparent background overlay.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YgFKbI7e/images/909f8817bdc1cce6daf656776057e01ab9d52aee.gif)

**[Aquarius Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs)** needs to be installed for this mod to work!

This client-side mod allows you to look around freely with your mouse or move while your inventory screen is open and removes the transparent background overlay by default.

 ---

What it does

**Hold Ctrl to Look Around (Free Look):** allowing you to **look around** using your mouse while you **press** the Free Look **keybind(can be changed)** and a container or chat window is open (crafting table, inventory, chest, chat, book, etc)

**Free Move:** allowing you to **move around** while your **inventory** screen is open and while pressing the **free move keybind** or if **permanent free move** is **enabled** in the **config** (it is enabled by default)

**Transparent Background Removed:** The **transparent** black **background** overlay **is** totally **gone**, giving you a normal, clear view of the world. (You can **disable it** in the **config**)

**Config Option:** transparent background visibility, permanent free move, can use shift/sneak, can move in mount inventory (mule etc)
 
 ---
 

_Anti-cheats have a problem with players moving around while the **boat inventory** is open so that is **NOT included** in the mod,
but the **mount inventory** is less of a problem so that **can be enabled** in the **configs** **(CAMERA ROTATION CAN BE STILL USED IN ANY OF THOSE)**_

  ---

Supported Versions

- **Loaders:** Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.
- **Versions:** 26.1.x
- _Note: No plans to support older versions below 26.1 for now!_

 ---

Found a Bug?

If you encounter any **bugs** or experience a **crash**, please **send** the **crash log** directly to me via **[curseforge private message](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aleni26/projects)** so I can look into it.
